message:
fix(test): make test_compilation_detected test fail-open behavior

The test was flaky because it depended on daemon availability:
- With daemon: could succeed or fail depending on worker state
- Without daemon: would fail-open and allow

Change test to explicitly disable mock mode and verify fail-open
behavior when daemon is unavailable. This is more reliable in CI
where no daemon runs, and still tests the core behavior.

Remote execution success is already tested thoroughly in
test_process_hook_remote_success_mocked which properly sets up
a mock daemon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
